Dashboard Archive: 2026-04-02 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker PARR dominates today's ranking at position #1 with an exceptional composite score of 98.0, driven by extraordinary returns across all timeframes—particularly its 1-year return of 352.96% and 3-month surge of 87.42%—while maintaining pristine technical structure (all four major SMAs passed). The ratio consistency is remarkably strong with 4 of 5 passes, and critically, PARR shows exceptional resilience on market downturns with a bad_spy_score of 4.55, indicating it held up well during periods when SPY declined. CLMT ranks second with a score near 98.0, posting strong 6-month (90.15%) and 1-year (175.14%) returns and maintaining full SMA support, though its 1-year outperformance versus SPY (159.35%) trails PARR significantly. Both tickers pass all SMA gates and show minimal pullback flags, suggesting they've sustained momentum without major reversals. The standout technical distinction is PARR's superior performance during adverse market conditions (bad_spy_score 4.55 vs CLMT's 0.99), marking it as the more defensible momentum play in today's dataset.
